# Golang Module (Chinese Source)

> English llms.txt for files under `docs/zh/golang`.

## Docs

- [Module Overview](./index.mdx): Entry page with RPress Badge components showing target audiences by skill level.
- [Install Guide](./install/install.mdx): Cross-platform Go installation overview with RPress Tabs and Badge components.
- [Install on Windows](./install/windows.mdx): Windows installation methods (MSI, Chocolatey, Scoop, ZIP, goup) with interactive Tabs.
- [Install on macOS](./install/macos.mdx): macOS installation methods (PKG, Homebrew, goup, source) with interactive Tabs.
- [Install on Linux](./install/linux.mdx): Linux installation methods (binary, apt, yum, snap, goup) with interactive Tabs.
- [Hello World](./hello.mdx): Interactive first Go program tutorial with RPress Tabs for different skill levels.
- [Sidebar Metadata](./_meta.json): Navigation metadata used by the Golang module sidebar.
- [Install Submodule Index](./install/llms.txt): English index for the installation subdirectory.
- [This LLMs File](./llms.txt): Machine-readable index for this Golang directory.

## Fundamentals

- [Fundamentals Overview](./fundamentals/overview.mdx): Overview of Go language fundamentals and concepts.
- [Naming Conventions](./fundamentals/naming-conventions.mdx): Go naming conventions including identifiers, package names, constants, and file naming.
- [Variables](./fundamentals/variables.mdx): Variable declaration methods, zero values, initialization, scope, and shadowing.
- [Type System](./fundamentals/type-system.mdx): Go type system overview with value types, reference types, and type conversion diagrams.
- [Functions and Methods](./fundamentals/functions-methods.mdx): Functions and methods in Go including parameters, return values, multiple return values, variadic functions, function types, higher-order functions, anonymous functions, closures, defer mechanism, generic functions (Go 1.18+), value vs pointer receivers, method values and expressions, and best practices.
- [Package System](./fundamentals/package-system.mdx): Go package system, imports, visibility, init functions, go.mod, go.work, and dependency management.
- [Variable Lifecycle](./fundamentals/variable-lifecycle.mdx): Variable scope, lexical scoping, closures, and lifetime with stack/heap allocation diagrams.
- [Fundamentals Sidebar](./fundamentals/_meta.json): Navigation metadata for fundamentals subdirectory.

## Data Types

- [Bool Types](./data-types/bool.mdx): Boolean type basics, logical operators, control flow, best practices, naming conventions, and common pitfalls.
- [Constants](./data-types/constants.mdx): Go constants including const declarations, iota enumerations, typed vs untyped constants, constant expressions, and common use cases.
- [Numeric Types](./data-types/numeric.mdx): Integer and floating-point types, type selection guide, literals, and conversions.
- [String Types](./data-types/string.mdx): String fundamentals, byte/rune conversions, immutability, common operations, and traversal.
- [Array Types](./data-types/array.mdx): Fixed-length arrays, initialization, value type semantics, multi-dimensional arrays, and comparison.
- [Slice Types](./data-types/slice.mdx): Dynamic slices, internal structure, append mechanism, common pitfalls, and operations.
- [Map Types](./data-types/map.mdx): Hash tables, CRUD operations, traversal, concurrency safety, and usage patterns.
- [Struct Types](./data-types/struct.mdx): Aggregate data types, struct tags, anonymous fields, comparison, memory layout, and common patterns including method chaining.
- [Pointer Types](./data-types/pointer.mdx): Memory addresses, pointer semantics, function parameters, best practices, and common pitfalls.
- [Generics](./data-types/generics.mdx): Go 1.18+ generics including type parameters, constraints, type inference, built-in constraints, and practical patterns.
- [Data Types Sidebar](./data-types/_meta.json): Navigation metadata for data-types subdirectory.
- [Data Types LLMs Index](./data-types/llms.txt): English index for data-types subdirectory.

## Interface

- [Interface Basics](./interface/interface-basics.mdx): Interface definition, implicit implementation, usage patterns, and compile-time implementation checks.
- [Interface Values](./interface/interface-values.mdx): Interface value internal structure, nil interfaces, nil pointer in interfaces, interface comparison, and interface vs inheritance.
- [Empty Interface](./interface/empty-interface.mdx): Empty interface (any), type assertions (safe/unsafe), type switches, and interface type assertions.
- [Interface Composition](./interface/interface-composition.mdx): Interface embedding, multi-level composition, adding new methods, naming conventions, composition vs inheritance, and composition patterns.
- [Best Practices](./interface/best-practices.mdx): Interface design principles, naming conventions, standard library interfaces, implementation patterns, anti-patterns, and code review checklist.
- [Interface Sidebar](./interface/_meta.json): Navigation metadata for interface subdirectory.
- [Interface LLMs Index](./interface/llms.txt): English index for interface subdirectory.

## Concurrency

- [Goroutine](./concurrency/goroutine.mdx): Lightweight threads, Go scheduler (G-M-P model), goroutine lifecycle, and common pitfalls.
- [Channel](./concurrency/channel.mdx): Channel creation, buffered vs unbuffered, channel directions, range, select, timeout control, common patterns, and pitfalls.
- [Channel Patterns](./concurrency/channel-patterns.mdx): Fan-in, fan-out, worker pool, quit channel, timeout, and producer-consumer patterns.
- [Sync Package](./concurrency/sync.mdx): Mutex, RWMutex, WaitGroup, Once, Cond, Map, and Pool synchronization primitives.
- [Atomic](./concurrency/atomic.mdx): Atomic operations, atomic types, atomic values, memory ordering, and common use cases.
- [Best Practices](./concurrency/best-practices.mdx): Concurrency design principles, performance optimization, anti-patterns, debugging, and testing.
- [Concurrency Sidebar](./concurrency/_meta.json): Navigation metadata for concurrency subdirectory.
- [Concurrency LLMs Index](./concurrency/llms.txt): English index for concurrency subdirectory.

## Functions and Methods

- [Function Basics](./functions-methods/function-basics.mdx): Function declaration syntax, parameter lists, return value mechanisms, function call flow, basic code examples, and common errors for beginners.
- [Methods System](./functions-methods/methods.mdx): Method declaration syntax, value vs pointer receivers, method values vs expressions, method set rules, interface implementation, and receiver selection decision tree.
- [Advanced Parameters](./functions-methods/advanced-parameters.mdx): Variadic functions, named return values, multiple return value patterns, parameter passing mechanism, and performance considerations.
- [Function Types](./functions-methods/function-types.mdx): Function type definitions, functions as variables, functions as parameters, functions as return values, higher-order function patterns, and practical applications.
- [Closures](./functions-methods/closures.mdx): Anonymous function syntax, closure principles, variable capture mechanism, closure pitfalls, Go 1.22+ changes, memory management, and practical examples.
- [Defer Mechanism](./functions-methods/defer.mdx): Defer basic syntax, LIFO execution order, parameter evaluation timing, interaction with named return values, resource cleanup patterns, panic recovery, and common pitfalls.
- [Error Handling](./functions-methods/panic-recover.mdx): Go error handling philosophy, multiple return value error patterns, error wrapping and unwrapping, panic trigger conditions, recover usage timing, custom error types, and best practices.
- [Best Practices](./functions-methods/best-practices.mdx): Function design principles, naming conventions, error handling patterns, performance optimization techniques, testability design, common anti-patterns, and code review checklist.
- [Functions and Methods Sidebar](./functions-methods/_meta.json): Navigation metadata for functions-methods subdirectory.
- [Functions and Methods LLMs Index](./functions-methods/llms.txt): English index for functions-methods subdirectory.

## Testing

- [Testing Module](./testing/): Complete Go testing framework documentation covering unit tests, benchmarks, fuzzing, mocking tools, and best practices.

### Basics

- [Test Files](./testing/basics/test-files.mdx): Test file naming conventions (_test.go suffix), test function signatures (TestXxx, ExampleXxx, BenchmarkXxx, FuzzXxx), go test command usage, package structure (white-box vs black-box testing), and build tags.

- [Assertions](./testing/basics/assertions.mdx): Using *testing.T methods (Error vs Fatal, Log/Skip, Cleanup, TempDir, Setenv, Parallel), helper functions with t.Helper(), and assertion patterns.

- [Table-Driven Tests](./testing/basics/table-driven.mdx): Table-driven tests structure, anonymous vs named structs, t.Run() subtests, test case naming, loop variable capture (Go 1.22+ range-over-func), parallel table tests, and AAA pattern.

- [Coverage](./testing/basics/coverage.mdx): -cover flag, -coverprofile generation, go tool cover (HTML/func reports), coverage modes (set, count, atomic), setting coverage targets, and coverage best practices.

### Advanced

- [Test Doubles](./testing/advanced/test-doubles.mdx): Test double types (Dummy, Stub, Spy, Fake, Mock), when to use each type, interface design for testing, and practical examples with Spy and Fake implementations.

- [Mocking](./testing/advanced/mocking.mdx): testify/mock framework (On, Return, AssertExpectations), gomock code generation and usage (mockgen, Controller, EXPECT, matchers, InOrder), and mock comparison table.

- [TestMain](./testing/advanced/test-main.mdx): TestMain(m *testing.M) signature, global setup/teardown, environment initialization, exit code handling, and lifecycle with t.Cleanup visualization.

- [Parallel Tests](./testing/advanced/parallel.mdx): t.Parallel() for parallel tests, -parallel flag, race detection with -race, synchronization mechanisms, and worker pool patterns.

### Benchmark

- [Benchmark Basics](./testing/benchmark/basics.mdx): BenchmarkXxx(b *testing.B) signature, b.N mechanism, timing control (ResetTimer, StopTimer, StartTimer), ReportAllocs for memory statistics, and parallel benchmarks.

- [Profiling](./testing/benchmark/profiling.mdx): CPU profiling (-cpuprofile), memory profiling (-memprofile), go tool pprof analysis, pprof commands (top, list, web), and optimization workflow.

- [Optimization](./testing/benchmark/optimization.mdx): Reducing memory allocations (StringBuilder, preallocation), avoiding unnecessary conversions, concurrency optimization (worker pools), algorithm optimization, and inline optimization.

### Fuzzing

- [Fuzz Introduction](./testing/fuzzing/introduction.mdx): FuzzXxx(f *testing.F) signature (Go 1.18+), f.Add() seed corpus, f.Fuzz() function, supported types, use cases, and fuzzing limitations.

- [Writing Fuzz](./testing/fuzzing/writing-fuzz.mdx): Fuzz test design principles, invariants, progressive validation, common patterns (input validation, algorithm verification, parser testing), and handling failures.

- [Fuzz Best Practices](./testing/fuzzing/best-practices.mdx): Seed corpus selection (boundary cases, real-world inputs, file-based), assertion design, performance considerations, crasher management, and CI/CD integration.

### Tools

- [testify](./testing/tools/testify.mdx): testify/assert (Equal, NotEqual, True, False, NoError, Contains, HasPrefix), testify/mock framework, testify/suite for test organization (SetupSuite, TearDownSuite, SetupTest, TearDownTest), and HTTP assertions.

- [gomock](./testing/tools/gomock.mdx): mockgen code generation, Controller lifecycle, EXPECT() API, matchers (Eq, Any, Len, Matcher), Times() call count verification, InOrder() verification, and Do/DoAndReturn callbacks.

- [Other Tools](./testing/tools/other-tools.mdx): quicktest, gotestsum, testcontainers-go (PostgreSQL, Redis containers), godog (BDD testing), goleak (goroutine leak detection), httptest (HTTP server testing), and pprof (performance analysis).

### Best Practices

- [Conventions](./testing/best-practices/conventions.mdx): Test naming conventions (Test<Function><Scenario>), AAA pattern (Arrange-Act-Assert), test isolation principles, avoiding logic in tests, clear error messages, and test documentation.

- [Architecture](./testing/best-practices/architecture.mdx): Test pyramid strategy (70% unit, 20% integration, 10% E2E), layered testing (unit vs integration vs E2E), dependency injection for testability, test organization structure, and golden file testing.

- [CI/CD Integration](./testing/best-practices/ci-cd.mdx): GitHub Actions workflows (multi-version, parallel jobs, test reports), GitLab CI configuration, coverage gates, benchmark regression detection, fuzzing in CI, race detection, and pre-commit hooks.

- [Testing Sidebar](./testing/_meta.json): Navigation metadata for testing subdirectory.
- [Testing LLMs Index](./testing/llms.txt): English index for testing subdirectory.
